mapper.select:
SELECT id, tenant_id, enterprise_name, business_license_no, business_license_url, other_certificates, verification_type, verification_amount, verification_status, verification_time, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM registry_enterprise_qualification
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND enterprise_name LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.enterpriseName}, '%')
AND business_license_no LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.businessLicenseNo}, '%')
AND verification_type LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.verificationType}, '%')
AND verification_status LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.verificationStatus}, '%')
